name: Cottage Cheese-Spinach Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Low Fat Cottage Cheese, rinsed and drained
10 ounces Frozen Chopped Spinach, partially thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine cottage cheese, egg substitute, and flour.
3. Add the cubed cheese and chopped spinach (with salt) to the mixture.
4. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
5. Bake uncovered for 60 minutes.
